description: JSON schema for the createOrganisationProperty and updateOrganisationProperty operation request payloads

key.description: The unique key used to identify the property.

name.description: The property's name. If not set this will be the same as the property's key.

required.description: Whether the property must be set before executing test sessions.

editableByUsers.description: Whether the property can be set by organisation users.

inTests.description: Whether the property should be exposed to test sessions.

inExports.description: Whether the property should be included in exports.

inSelfRegistration.description: Whether the property should be requested during self-registration.

hidden.description: Whether the property should be hidden from organisation users.

allowedValues.description: The list of allowed values for the property.

displayOrder.description: The display order of the property when presented to users.

dependsOn.description: The key of another property upon which this property's applicability depends on (see also dependsOnValue).

dependsOnValue.description: If the dependsOn property is set, this is the value that the referred-to property needs to have for this property to be considered applicable.

defaultValue.description: The default value of the property when a new organisation is created.

allowedPropertyValue.description: An entry for a configuration property representing an allowed value and its display label.
